center.name: 科摩罗群岛
center.summary: 科摩罗群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Frances's sparrowhawk、Malagasy harrier、鹃三宝鸟等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: superciliosus occurs in eastern Ethiopia, Somalia and Kenya, and southwards through East Africa to southern Mozambique and the Zambezi Valley, as well as the Comoro Islands and Madagascar; M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bronze mannikin is native to mainland Africa and the Bioko, Pemba, Zanzibar, Mafia and Comoro islands, and has been introduced to Puerto Rico, where it is established. The two accepted races have an extensive region around the upper Nile River which is inhabited by birds with intermediate features
